latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC1: 아레나 진입 시 HUD 하단에 참가 캐릭터 카드 목록이 표시됨
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _char_hud_scroll added as child of _hud with PRESET_BOTTOM_WIDE anchor; _refresh_char_hud_strip() creates PanelContainer cards per GameState.characters entry

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC2: 매 턴 후 characters_updated 시그널 수신 시 HP bar 실시간 갱신
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _on_chars_updated() connected at line 61 calls _refresh_hud() → _refresh_char_hud_strip() → _update_char_hud_card() updating hp_bar.value each cycle

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC3: HP 비율 70%↑ 녹색, 30–70% 황금색, 30%↓ 빨간색
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _update_char_hud_card() applies StyleBoxFlat fill: ratio>0.7→Color(0.2,0.85,0.4), ratio>0.3→Color(1.0,0.82,0.2), else→Color(0.9,0.3,0.3)
card.modulate.a = 0.35 if not is_alive else 1.0 in _update_char_hud_card()

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC5: 내 캐릭터 카드에 accent-purple border 강조
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _update_char_hud_card() matches data.get('id') == _selected_character.get('id') and applies StyleBoxFlat border_color=Color(0.6,0.4,0.9) width=2 all sides

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC6: 아레나 화면 아닐 때 캐릭터 스트립 미표시
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _char_hud_scroll is child of _hud; _show_screen() sets _hud.visible=(name=='arena'); _clear_char_nodes() frees cards on game end

validationChecks.criterion: AC1: 아레나 진입 시 HUD 하단에 참가 캐릭터 카드 목록이 표시됨
validationChecks.evidence: _char_hud_scroll is added as child of _hud with PRESET_BOTTOM_WIDE anchor; _refresh_char_hud_strip() creates PanelContainer cards for each GameState.characters entry on first call

validationChecks.criterion: AC2: 매 턴 후 characters_updated 시그널 수신 시 HP bar가 실시간 갱신됨
validationChecks.evidence: _on_chars_updated() (already connected at line 61) calls _refresh_hud() which now calls _refresh_char_hud_strip(); _update_char_hud_card() updates hp_bar.value each cycle

validationChecks.criterion: AC3: HP 비율 70%↑ 녹색, 30–70% 황금색, 30%↓ 빨간색
validationChecks.evidence: _update_char_hud_card() sets bar_color: ratio>0.7→Color(0.2,0.85,0.4), ratio>0.3→Color(1.0,0.82,0.2), else→Color(0.9,0.3,0.3); applied via StyleBoxFlat fill override

validationChecks.criterion: AC4: 사망한 캐릭터 카드는 반투명(alpha 0.35)으로 표시
validationChecks.evidence: card.modulate.a = 0.35 if not is_alive else 1.0 in _update_char_hud_card()

validationChecks.criterion: AC5: 내 캐릭터 카드에 accent-purple border 강조 표시
validationChecks.evidence: _update_char_hud_card() checks data.get('id') == _selected_character.get('id') and applies StyleBoxFlat with border_color=Color(0.6,0.4,0.9) width=2 on all sides

validationChecks.criterion: AC6: 아레나 화면이 아닐 때 캐릭터 스트립이 표시되지 않음 (HUD 가시성과 연동)
validationChecks.evidence: _char_hud_scroll is a child of _hud; _show_screen() sets _hud.visible = (name == 'arena'), so strip is hidden whenever not in arena. _clear_char_nodes() also frees and clears _char_hud_cards on game end.
